channel.title: Homes on Diogo F.T. Veiga
channel.description: Recent content in Homes on Diogo F.T. Veiga

item.title: Academic
item.description: The highly flexible website framework for Hugo with an extensible plugin mechanism. Create a beautifully simple site in under 10 minutes 🚀 Latest release Star

About me I am currently a Full Computational Scientist at the Jackson Laboratory. I joined Jacques Banchereau’s lab at the Jackson Laboratory to help developing a groundbreaking research program aimed at the identification of cancer isoforms using hybrid-capture long-read sequencing. Here, I am leading the development of a proteogenomics pipeline to analyze hybrid-capture long-read isoform sequencing, RNA-seq, and proteomics datasets to discover RNA-based neoantigens that can be exploited for immunotherapy.

item.title: Mentoring
item.description: Here are the students I’ve mentored recently at JAX. 2018 Qianchang Wang, Academic Year Intern at the Jackson Laboratoy. Project: A novel method for clustering and quantification of cancer isoforms detected using hybrid-capture long read sequencing. 2017 Mary Accurso, Co-Op Associate/Summer Intern at the Jackson Laboratoy. Project: Prediction of soluble and membrane isoforms in the immune transcriptome sequenced using PacBio long read technology.

item.title: Software
item.description: maser R/Bioconductor package. This package provides functionalities for analysis, annotation and visualizaton of alternative splicing events.

item.title: Teaching
item.description: 2018 Data Carpentry Genomics, The Jackson Laboratory for Genomic Medicine, Farmington, USA. R for Reproducible Scientific Analysis, Uconn Health, Center for Quantitative Medicine, Farmington, USA.
